subcodes.first_line: Trustworthiness is even as the sun: when it dawneth from the horizon of wisdom's heaven, it illumineth all regions, and thus hath it been ordained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان الامانة شمس اذا اشرقت من افق سماء حکمة اضائت منها الافاق و قدر لها
subcodes.subjects: @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @exhortations and counsels, @knowledge; recognition of God
